Freesound CC0 weapon foley collection
All sounds below are licensed CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
Selected via Freesound's license filter: license:"Creative Commons 0".
Files are Freesound's HQ Ogg Vorbis encodes of the CC0 originals.
Downloaded: 2026-07-23. No attribution required; credits retained as thanks.

File -> Freesound source (id, author, original title):
